steps.title: Match the singular instrument
steps.content: The subject is 'The vest frottoir,' a singular instrument. The sentence defines what that instrument is, so it needs a singular present-tense verb.

steps.title: Reject plural verbs
steps.content: Choice A uses a plural perfect form. Choice C uses a plural past-tense verb. Choice D uses a plural present-tense verb. None agrees with the singular subject. The answer is B.
